PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(YEAR(?firstBroadcast) AS ?year) WHERE {
  wd:Q212135 wdt:P527 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P571 ?firstBroadcast .
  FILTER(YEAR(?firstBroadcast) > 2006)
}
ORDER BY ?firstBroadcast
LIMIT 1
